name: Sneaking Through the Old Mill
description: The old watermill stands dark against the evening sky, its wheel still turning with a rhythmic creak. Smugglers have made it their storehouse, and a pair of lookouts warm their hands by a brazier near the door. You must slip past them to reach the passage beyond.
failureConsequence: A loose board groans underfoot and the lookouts spring to their feet. You are chased into the night and must circle back by a longer path, losing precious hours.
